name: vscode-extensions
description: Monorepo for VS Code extensions maintained by Karolis Mauragas.

scripts.clean: node -e "for (const path of ['out', 'extensions/git-branches-panel/out']) { require('fs').rmSync(path, { recursive: true, force: true }); }"
scripts.ensure:root-deps: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const {spawnSync}=require('child_process');const pkgPath=process.env.npm_package_json||path.join(process.cwd(),'package.json');const root=path.dirname(pkgPath);const pkg=require(pkgPath);const required=Object.keys(pkg.devDependencies||{}).map((name)=>path.join(root,'node_modules',...name.split('/'),'package.json'));if(required.every(fs.existsSync)){process.exit(0);}const command=process.platform==='win32'?'npm.cmd':'npm';const args=[fs.existsSync(path.join(root,'package-lock.json'))?'ci':'install'];console.log('Installing root dependencies...');const result=spawnSync(command,args,{cwd:root,stdio:'inherit'});if(result.error)throw result.error;if(result.status!==0)process.exit(result.status??1);"
scripts.build:git-branches-panel: npm run ensure:root-deps && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('extensions/git-branches-panel/out', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p ./extensions/git-branches-panel/tsconfig.json
scripts.lint:git-branches-panel: npm run ensure:root-deps && eslint extensions/git-branches-panel/src extensions/git-branches-panel/test
scripts.test:coverage:git-branches-panel: npm run build:git-branches-panel && c8 --reporter=text --all --include='extensions/git-branches-panel/out/**/*.js' node --test extensions/git-branches-panel/test
